task: Make Jorge's quality standard the first standing law (Rule #0). Adds docs/specs/QUALITY-STANDARD-LOCKED.md (verbatim), wires a Rule #0 pointer at the top of CURSOR-PERMANENT-RULES.md, and a static CI guard (verify-quality-standard-present.mjs) chained into verify:arch-design that fails if the doc is missing, an anchor phrase is removed, or Rule #0 is dropped. Tier 3: docs + static guard only — no app code, no migration, no flag, no schema. NOTE: registered via the inline package.json verify:arch-design chain (the reliable path) rather than a scripts/verify-guards/ directory wrapper, because guard 139-verify-kpi-sources-of-truth-exists.mjs self-exits at import time and short-circuits loadExtraGuards — a directory wrapper would never execute (fake-green). This landmine is flagged for a separate block.
